indexes.name: academic_years_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX academic_years_pkey ON public.academic_years USING btree (id)

indexes.name: academic_years_year_name_key
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX academic_years_year_name_key ON public.academic_years USING btree (year_name)

indexes.name: account_delete_requests_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX account_delete_requests_pkey ON public.account_delete_requests USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_account_delete_requests_requisition_date
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_account_delete_requests_requisition_date ON public.account_delete_requests USING btree (requisition_date DESC)

indexes.name: idx_account_delete_requests_status
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_account_delete_requests_status ON public.account_delete_requests USING btree (status)

indexes.name: idx_account_delete_requests_user_id
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_account_delete_requests_user_id ON public.account_delete_requests USING btree (user_id)

indexes.name: accounts_expense_categories_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX accounts_expense_categories_pkey ON public.accounts_expense_categories USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_accounts_expense_categories_name_year
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_accounts_expense_categories_name_year ON public.accounts_expense_categories USING btree (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM (category_name)::text)), COALESCE(academic_year_id, '-1'::integer))

indexes.name: idx_accounts_expense_categories_year
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_expense_categories_year ON public.accounts_expense_categories USING btree (academic_year_id)

indexes.name: accounts_expenses_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX accounts_expenses_pkey ON public.accounts_expenses USING btree (id)

indexes.name: idx_accounts_expenses_category
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_expenses_category ON public.accounts_expenses USING btree (category_id)

indexes.name: idx_accounts_expenses_date
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_expenses_date ON public.accounts_expenses USING btree (expense_date)

indexes.name: idx_accounts_expenses_invoice_year
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_accounts_expenses_invoice_year ON public.accounts_expenses USING btree (TRIM(BOTH FROM (invoice_no)::text), COALESCE(academic_year_id, '-1'::integer)) WHERE ((invoice_no IS NOT NULL) AND (TRIM(BOTH FROM (invoice_no)::text) <> ''::text))

indexes.name: idx_accounts_expenses_year
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX idx_accounts_expenses_year ON public.accounts_expenses USING btree (academic_year_id)

indexes.name: idx_accounts_income_invoice_year
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_accounts_income_invoice_year ON public.accounts_income USING btree (TRIM(BOTH FROM (invoice_no)::text), COALESCE(academic_year_id, '-1'::integer)) WHERE ((invoice_no IS NOT NULL) AND (TRIM(BOTH FROM (invoice_no)::text) <> ''::text))

indexes.name: idx_parent_persons_email_lower
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_parent_persons_email_lower ON public.parent_persons USING btree (lower(TRIM(BOTH FROM email))) WHERE ((email IS NOT NULL) AND (length(TRIM(BOTH FROM email)) > 0))

indexes.name: idx_parent_persons_phone_digits
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_parent_persons_phone_digits ON public.parent_persons USING btree (regexp_replace((COALESCE(phone, ''::character varying))::text, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text)) WHERE (length(regexp_replace((COALESCE(phone, ''::character varying))::text, '[^0-9]'::text, ''::text, 'g'::text)) > 0)
